response: Imagine you’ve got a slightly curved, yellow-colored Euro-style plug that’s missing one of its prongs. You’re trying to plug it into one of three different wall outlets: one with two round pins, another with two flat pins, or the third with three pins. Which outlet will work for your plug?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a bent yellow Euro plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
